title: Fix CLI message post to use structured error handling
description: The `message post` CLI command (src/cli/index.ts:403-427) has its own try/catch + process.exit(1) instead of using `runMutation`. Errors bypass the structured CommandResult envelope and it has no --json flag, unlike every other write command. Refactor to use runMutation for consistency (spec §18.1).
acceptance: message post uses runMutation like other write commands.
Errors are surfaced as coded diagnostics, not raw stack traces.
notes: Found during code audit on 2026-07-06. Spec §18.1 requires all commands to return CommandResult with structured diagnostics. The message post command was the only write command bypassing this.
